title: Update all friend card paragraphs to warm and playful third-person group tone

requirements.text: Rewrite all seven friend tribute message paragraphs in `frontend/src/data/friendsData.ts` to use a warm and playful third-person tone, written as if the entire friend group is collectively hyping up each person (e.g., 'We all know her as...', 'Ask anyone in the group and they'll tell you...', 'She's the one we all turn to when...'). The voice should feel like a group shoutout, not a personal message from one person. Apply this to every friend entry in the array.

quotes: can you seem like the paras are from a 3rd person like the whole grp is telling about that person

acceptanceCriteria: All seven friend entries in friendsData.ts have their tribute message paragraphs rewritten in third-person collective voice
The tone is warm and playful throughout — not formal or somber
Each paragraph reads as if the whole group is speaking together (e.g., uses 'we', 'us', 'the whole group', 'everyone knows')
No paragraph uses first-person singular ('I') or second-person ('you') voice
Friend names, titles, epithets, and all other fields remain unchanged
The updated text renders correctly on the friend cards and tribute panels

constraints: Do not change any friend's id, name, title, epithet, animationType, or emoji fields
Do not modify any component files — only the data in friendsData.ts
nonGoals: Adding new friends or removing existing ones
Changing the visual design or layout of friend cards
Modifying the TributePanel or TributeLettersSection components
